senators.name: Mike Crapo
senators.nerdReason: B.A. summa cum laude in political science from Brigham Young University and J.D. cum laude from Harvard Law School. Top of class at both institutions demonstrates exceptional analytical rigor. Chairman of the Senate Finance Committee, navigating complex tax and economic policy. Decades of deep expertise in fiscal and regulatory policy.
education: B.A. Political Science (summa cum laude), Brigham Young University

senators.name: Jim Risch
senators.notNerdReason: B.S. in forestry from University of Idaho and J.D. from University of Idaho College of Law. Forestry is a science degree showing STEM foundation. Career as attorney, rancher, and politician. Former governor. Strong credentials but legislative approach is more traditional political than analytically driven.
education: J.D., University of Idaho College of Law
experience: Former Chair, Senate Foreign Relations Committee

ID-01.name: Russ Fulcher
ID-01.nerdReason: B.S. and M.B.A. from Boise State University with additional certifications in electronic engineering. Spent 24 years in the high-technology industry, including at Micron Technology (one of the world's largest semiconductor manufacturers). Deep tech industry experience combined with engineering certifications demonstrates strong analytical and technical foundation.
experience: High-tech Industry, 24 years (Micron Technology, Preco Electronics)

ID-02.name: Mike Simpson
ID-02.nerdReason: D.D.S. from Washington University in St. Louis. Practiced dentistry in Blackfoot, Idaho for over 20 years before Congress. Dental degree requires rigorous science education in biology, chemistry, and anatomy. Long tenure on Appropriations Committee with detailed budget analysis expertise. Speaker of the Idaho House before Congress.
education: D.D.S., Washington University in St. Louis
